chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 1055 of 2019 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.4101/2019 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 07.09.2023 Mr. Sarfraz A. Akhund, Advocate for the Petitioner Syed Israr Ahmed Shah associate of Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for Respondents No.3 and 4 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that land of the petitioner was occupied by Town Committee, Pano Akil, hence, he filed an application for compensation before the Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Pano Aki. When he did not decide the same, he moved to this Court under its constitutional jurisdiction, and was able to seek directions for Mukhtiarkar to decide his application; finally it was decided by Mukhtiarkar (Revenue) Pano Akil vide order dated 20.03.2015 in terms of five conditions enumerated therein. Accordingly, all the conditions have been fulfilled except condition No.3 whereby a post of Naib Qasid / Chowkidar was to be given to the petitioner in lieu of the land occupied by Town Committee, Pano Akil. However, after arguing the case at length, the petitioner’s counsel has agreed to withdraw this petition and file an application before the competent forum for redressal of his grievance in accordance with law, to which other side has apparently no objection. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of as not pressed along with listed application in the above terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI
